2131990.name: Seeking Asylum: LionHeart (DEMO)
2131990.description:
Follow Emily Elkins through her origin story in Seeking Asylum Lionheart.

Gameplay features

Singleplayer RPG
Items to collect
Quests to accept and hand in
Equip different weapons or just attack with your fists
Increase stats and become a fighting machine
Sneak up behind unsuspecting enemies and perform an array of different assassinations
Meet and assist different members of the Asylum as you play through the game
Build this game with the developer by following the youtube and instagram and be a part of the project
Have fun

Go through Emily's storyline and character arc to become the leader of the guild and protect VAX
2131990.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
